case_title: MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP VS. JASON KAVERT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAVERT, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 GEARY ST. #105 IN THE CITY OF COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KAVERT, JASON
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED . FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT KAVERT, JASON DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KAVERT, JASON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KAVERT, JASON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP SERVED NOV-01-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAVERT, JASON
